assertions.text: Output uses industry-standard radio documentary format with NAR, CUT/CLIP, and ATMOS labels
Documentary has a discernible narrative arc
Narration blocks before clips do not pre-quote what listener is about to hear

script-format.note: NAR, CLIP, and ATMOS labels used correctly throughout

narrative-arc.note: Opening hook, development through routine, and close with retirement question

no-pre-quoting.note: No narration pre-quotes any clip content

script-format.note: Standard format maintained with NAR, CLIP, ATMOS labels

narrative-arc.note: Arc present: opening observation, two voices in tension, reflective close

script-format.note: Full format with NAR, CLIP, and ATMOS labels; 20-minute structure mapped

narrative-arc.note: Strong arc: factory closure, three responses (loss, leadership, renewal), forward-looking close

no-pre-quoting.note: No pre-quoting; each narration earns its following clip
